title: Lycopodioides unilateralis
taxonomy: Lycopodioides unilateralis is a species of club moss, and its classification is as follows: it belongs to the family Lycopodiaceae, which is a group of small, non-vascular plants. This family is part of the division Lycopodiophyta, which is a group of vascular and non-vascular plants that are thought to have evolved from a common ancestor. The classification helps scientists understand the evolutionary relationships between different plant species.
